steps.title: Find the missing width
steps.content:
The base area equals length times width. Let $w$ be the missing width.
$$
30t=\frac{5}{2}w
$$
$$
w=30t\cdot\frac{2}{5}=12t
$$

steps.title: Use surface area
steps.content:
Use $l=\frac{5}{2}$, $w=12t$, and $h=12$. The three different face areas are:
$$
lw=30t
$$
$$
lh=30
$$
$$
wh=144t
$$

steps.title: Add all face pairs
steps.content: A right rectangular prism has two faces of each type, so add the three face areas and multiply by $2$. $$ SA=2(30t+30+144t)=2(174t+30)=348t+60 $$ The answer is B.
